meaning: adj.无瑕疵的,无缺点的,无裂缝的
examples: Discovery's takeoff this morning from Cape Canaveral was flawless.
He got through without a mistake--flawless and precious triumph.
In any event, my mother and her red pen showed me how deeply flawed a flawless essay could be.
All the performances are flawless, but Jeff Daniels' portrait is a tour de force.
He says they have to make implementation flawless in the transition to Windows from Symbian.
